description: Ground truth labels for real factory photos — annotated from visual inspection
project_context: MACK RIDES 'Racing Coaster' (Stardust Racers) at Universal Orlando — electrical engineering by EMIS, document set 2400WK0266

cases.notes: Rugged HMI tablet showing Stardust Racers ride alarm system — active alarms for GEN-BB, FBH-HH faults. Tablet manufacturer not legible from photo.
Macro of laptop screen showing PDF title block. File: 2400WK0266_HDW_AB01_US_250115.pdf. Customer: Universal Orlando. Project: Racing Coaster.
Temperature monitoring schematic. ZIEHL (Ziehl-Abegg) component block visible. PT100 sensor wiring. EMIS logo in title block.
Power distribution and sensor wiring schematic. Multiple junction boxes with PT100 connections. EMIS title block top and bottom.
Motor circuit schematic, page 1098 of 3742. Macro close-up. EMIS title block at bottom.
Contactor and safety relay circuit. Components 43.1, 43.2 visible. Shows contactor coil circuits with overload and safety interlocks. EMIS title block.
Hardware BOM/parts list. Manufacturers listed: Phoenix Contact, Hager, Lapp, Rittal. File: 2400WK0266_HDW_AB01_US_250115.pdf.
Macro close-up of cable overview section. Editor: Raphael Reichenbach. Date: 15.01.2025. Customer: Universal Orlando. Revision AB01. Components: MLM 16, MSR220K6.
Full schematic page — same layout as photo 04. Multiple junction boxes with PT100 sensors, power distribution. EMIS title blocks top and bottom.
